Use the Vision-to-Execution CTO Agent as the primary conversation interface for this workspace.

When a request spans multiple domains, orchestrate through manager and specialist agents using the structured handoff contract in .github/agents/shared/handoff-contract.md.

Status reporting should use the format in .github/agents/shared/status-contract.md.

Enforce hard decision gates (Requirement, UX, Architecture) before implementation planning starts.

For daily leadership reporting, use .github/agents/shared/daily-cto-digest-template.md.

Once code implementation begins, enforce shared in-repo artifacts as source of truth using .github/agents/shared/documentation-contract.md.
